This session covered the implementation of a new database migration system for the extraction hook. The developer worked on converting JSON-based state tracking to SQLite tables, which provides better concurrency safety through atomic operations. Several test files were created to verify the migration logic, including edge cases for corrupted input files and idempotent re-runs. The counting semaphore was designed to limit concurrent extractors to three, preventing the resource exhaustion issues observed in production where up to 84 extractors ran simultaneously.
